prompt: A photographer shot an MMA tournament with three cameras and needs the footage delivered same-day via QR codes. Which single SFV branch does this belong to? Reply with exactly one branch name from: MYTHOLOGY, SFV_LIVE, SFV_EVENTS, SFV_ATHLETICS, SFV_STUDIO, SFV_UGC, SFV_ARCHIVE, SFV_WORLD, SFV_404.
